title: Feet
questions: What do you know about feet?
What English words do you know that describe the feet of animals or birds?
What does it mean to 'get your feet wet' and when was the last time you got your feet wet?
If you 'have both feet on the ground,' are you practical and sensible or the opposite. Do you have both feet on the ground?
Do you think it's OK to have cheesy (smelly) feet? Do you have cheesy feet?
Do you ever get tired through being on your feet all day?
Do you wish you had bigger or smaller feet?
Are your feet ticklish?
Have you ever injured your feet?
What is reflexology? Do you think it works?
Do you like your feet?
Do you think feet are attractive?
What's the difference between 'to have one's foot in the door' and 'to have one foot in the grave'?
Do you ever 'walk your feet off' going shopping or sightseeing?
Can you easily get out of tricky situations by thinking on your feet?
In romance, have you ever been swept off your feet or have you ever swept someone off her feet?
Do you like walking in bare feet?
Have you ever got cold feet and then regretted it later?
Do you like foot massages?
Do you ever do something feet first?
